case_title: HEALY, JOHN vs. CIESIOLKA, LISA et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION GRANTED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY-#2 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEALY, JOHN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CIESIOLKA, LISA GAUDIO, LARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1801 23RD AVENUE #14, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-06-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DMGS. DEFTS' SECURITY DEPOSITS, IF ANY, TO BE RETAINED BY PLTF. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. IF DEFT GAUDIO VACATES TIMELY, PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMNT & DISM W/PREJ. DEFT CIESIOLKA VACATED AS OF 7-22-96;PLTF TO FILE DISMISL.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEALY, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CIESIOLKA, LISA GAUDIO, LARA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

DEFTS' SECURITY DEPOSITS, IF ANY, TO BE RETAINED BY PLTF. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. IF DEFT GAUDIO VACATES TIMELY, PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMNT & DISM W/PREJ.
